description: Update .agents/state files to reflect Phase 6 and Phase 7 completion. Update quant-autonomous-status.json with phase-6 and phase-7 in completed_phases. Update quant-phase-log.md with evidence of all gates passing.
steps: 1. Run all quality gates: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, pnpm typecheck, pnpm test, pnpm build, pnpm lint, pnpm audit --audit-level=high. Record results.

2. Update .agents/state/quant-autonomous-status.json: set current_phase to 'phase-7-complete', add 'phase-6' and 'phase-7' to completed_phases array, update last_updated timestamp, confirm all gates pass.
3. Update .agents/state/quant-phase-log.md: append Phase 6 and Phase 7 entries with summary of what was implemented and gate verification evidence (command outputs showing pass counts).
acceptance_criteria: quant-autonomous-status.json shows current_phase as phase-7-complete with phase-6 and phase-7 in completed_phases
quant-phase-log.md has Phase 6 and Phase 7 entries with evidence
All quality gates pass: install, typecheck, test, build, lint, audit
findings: All quality gates verified: install OK, typecheck 72/72 PASS, test 75/75 PASS, build 51/51 PASS, lint 61/61 PASS, audit 0 high (8 total: 1 low + 7 moderate). Prettier reformatted files via lint-staged on commit.
